title: PDF Viewer fixed scrollport — zoom does not shrink tool window (dbg87)
description: Ctrl+wheel zoom was shrinking the entire PDF viewer pane because the scroll container used flex:0 0 auto and width:auto, sizing to page content. When pages zoomed out, the dark scrollport shrank with them. dbg87 locks the scrollport to full panel width; only page tiles inside zoom. Fit-to-width no longer re-runs on resize when continuous viewer is active (prevents shrink loop).
changeLog: Scrollport fills panel width — does not shrink on zoom out.
planBoardLockContinuousViewerScrollport on mount and wheel zoom.
Skip fit-to-width recalc during continuous viewer resize (no shrink loop).
CSS flex:1 1 0 for continuous scroll in viewer-plans row.
